---
name: UX / Design issue
about: Report a user experience problem or share design feedback (for users and UX designers)
labels: ux, needs triage

---

**What were you trying to do?**
Describe the task or goal you had in mind — no technical detail needed.

**What happened?**
Describe what the application did that was confusing, unexpected, or frustrating.

**What did you expect to happen?**
Describe what you thought would happen instead.

**Where did it happen?**
Which screen, page, or part of the application were you using?

**Screenshots or recordings**
If possible, add a screenshot, screen recording, or sketch to illustrate the issue.

**Who is affected?**
- [ ] All users
- [ ] Specific role (e.g. nurse, pharmacist, prescriber) — please specify: ___
- [ ] Only on certain devices or screen sizes

**Device / context**
- Device: [e.g. desktop, tablet, phone]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Safari, Firefox]
- Screen size / resolution (if relevant): ___

**Additional context**
Any other observations, suggestions, or examples from other tools that handle this better.
